Welcome to Nahma Golf Club, set on the shores of Big Bay de Noc in Michigan’s Upper Peninsula. Established in 1922, the club has offered honest, affordable golf for generations.
Lakeside setting: The only public course in the region with direct access to Big Bay de Noc, providing unforgettable bay views on every round.
Historic roots: Since 1922, Nahma’s fairways have welcomed golfers seeking a classic, laid-back golf experience in Delta County.
Community hub: Home to three weekly leagues, a full clubhouse, and a season full of scrambles and outings—Nahma brings people together.

Nahma is a public 9-hole course (par 36, 2,875 yards), open May through September. Play 18 holes by replaying the original 9. Walk-ins are always welcome, and $18 green fees keep golf accessible for everyone.
Meet the people behind Nahma Golf Club—dedicated staff and volunteers who keep the course and clubhouse running.
